title: ervum ludovicianum
intro: Ervum ludovicianum, also known as Ludwig's aster or prairie clover, is a perennial legume native to North America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Ervum ludovicianum has been associated with several health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and antioxidant activity. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
